title: athanasia scabra
intro: Athanasia scabra, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to aid in the treatment of inflammation and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Athanasia scabra include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of the plant often include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
